text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, July 06. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Toddlers are full of energy. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Having dinner with our friends tonight. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Neighborhood connections are fun. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Reading a new book before bed. My starting running back is questionable. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Relaxation mode active. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Automations are great when they work. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan's team played a match and won 2-1! Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Busy day for sports! What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Let's organize the menu. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning a street block party soon. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: I've mapped the locations. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Setting my fantasy football lineup. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Relaxation mode active. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Home maintenance is a constant cycle. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've got the schedule covered. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Sarah found a new recipe to try. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Healthy choices are great. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Good weekend progress on home projects. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
